deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate && python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth.models import User; User.objects.filter(username='admin').exists() or User.objects.create_superuser('admin', 'admin@venice-autocars.ma', 'admin123')" && python seed_data.py && gunicorn config.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:8080 --workers 2 --log-file -
